mission: To accelerate Africa's AI ecosystem by fostering collaboration, knowledge sharing, and innovation across the continent while ensuring ethical and inclusive AI development.
key_objectives: Create a pan-African AI network of researchers, entrepreneurs, and policymakers
Develop AI solutions addressing Africa's unique challenges
Establish ethical AI frameworks tailored to African contexts
Increase AI literacy across educational institutions
Attract investment for African AI startups
achievements: Developed AI Curriculum Framework for African Universities

host.name: Government of Ghana
host.description: The Government of Ghana is the proud host of the Pan African AI Summit 2026, demonstrating its commitment to positioning Ghana as Africa's digital hub and AI innovation center.

lead_organizer.name: Ministry of Communication, Digital Technology and Innovations
lead_organizer.description: The Ministry leads the strategic direction of the summit, ensuring alignment with Ghana's digital transformation agenda and technology policy framework.

co_organizers.name: Ministry of Youth Development & Empowerment
co_organizers.description: Focusing on youth engagement, skills development programs, and creating opportunities for young African innovators.

co_organizers.name: Data Protection Commission
co_organizers.description: Ensuring data privacy, ethical AI governance, and responsible technology implementation.

ui_config.welcome_message: Welcome to the Pan African AI Summit Assistant! I'm here to help you prepare for our next gathering on September 22nd - 23rd, 2026 in Accra, Ghana. What would you like to explore?

event_details.intro: The Pan African AI Summit (PAAIS) is Africa's premier platform for AI innovation and policy. Here are the details for our 2026 edition:
event_details.theme: Scaling Africa's Ethical AI Ecosystem: Youth Empowerment, Policy, Partnerships, and Skill

sessions: 09:00 AM - Opening Ceremony & Keynote Address by Hon. Sam George
10:00 AM - Plenary Session 1: Scaling Africa's Ethical AI
11:30 AM - Panel Discussion: AI Policy & Governance
02:00 PM - Masterclass: Building LLMs for African Languages
09:00 AM - Keynote: Dr. Jason Hickey (ex-Google Research Africa)
10:30 AM - Panel: AI in Healthcare & Agriculture
12:00 PM - Ministerial Roundtable: Youth Empowerment in AI
04:00 PM - Fireside Chat with Industry Leaders

faqs.question: What is the Pan African AI Summit?
faqs.answer: The Pan African AI Summit (PAAIS) is Africa's premier platform for AI innovation and policy. It brings together global tech leaders, African startups, and policymakers to develop a unified digital strategy for the continent.

faqs.question: Where and when is the next summit?
faqs.answer: The second edition of the Pan African AI Summit will take place from 22nd to 23rd September 2026. It will be held at the Kempinski Hotel Gold Coast City in Accra, Ghana.

faqs.question: What is the theme for the 2026 Summit?
faqs.answer: The 2026 theme is 'Scaling Africa's Ethical AI Ecosystem: Youth Empowerment, Policy, Partnerships, and Skill.' The event focuses on moving from strategy to actionable implementation across the continent.

faqs.question: What can I expect from the program?
faqs.answer: The two-day agenda includes keynote speeches from international AI pioneers, panel and plenary sessions, one-on-one interviews with tech leaders, hands-on masterclasses for technical skill-building, AI pitch competition for startups, and VIP networking sessions.

faqs.question: Who is organizing the summit?
faqs.answer: The summit is organized by the Ministry of Communication, Digital Technology and Innovations of Ghana, in partnership with the Ministry of Youth Development & Empowerment. Strategic partners include Google, AWS, MTN Ghana, Accenture, and academic partners like University of Ghana and Ashesi University.

faqs.question: Who are the main sponsors?
faqs.answer: Our main sponsors include Google, AWS, MTN Ghana, Accenture, Deloitte, and Société Générale. We also have support from various academic and government institutions across Africa.

faqs.question: Is there a virtual attendance option?
faqs.answer: Yes! The summit will be hybrid, allowing both in-person and virtual attendance. Virtual participants will have access to live streams of all plenary sessions and select breakout sessions.

faqs.question: Are there networking opportunities?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We have dedicated networking sessions, a welcome reception, lunch breaks, and a gala dinner. There's also a networking app to connect with other attendees before, during, and after the event.

featured.other: AI for Radiology Chair, United Nations
featured.bio: Pioneering AI solutions for healthcare and agriculture in Africa. Leading UN initiatives on AI in radiology and global health. Founder of KaraAgro AI for agricultural solutions.

featured.name: Dr. Jason Hickey
featured.title: Former Head

speakers.intro: Interested in speaking at the Pan African AI Summit? Here's what you need to know:

requirements: Relevant experience and past speaking engagements

faqs.question: How can I apply to speak at the 2026 Summit?
faqs.answer: We are currently looking for experts in Ethical AI, LLMs for African languages, and AI applications in healthcare, agritech, and edutech. You can submit your abstract and bio through the 'Call for Speakers' link at panafricanaisummit.com/call-for-speakers.

faqs.question: What are the key focus areas for sessions?
faqs.answer: For 2026, we are specifically prioritising Youth Empowerment, Policy Development, Economic Impact, Partnerships, and Skills Development. We also welcome proposals on emerging AI topics relevant to Africa.

faqs.question: Will speakers receive any compensation?
faqs.answer: While speaking slots are voluntary, selected speakers receive complimentary VIP access to the summit, networking opportunities with industry leaders, and recognition across our media channels. Travel and accommodation may be covered for keynotes and panelists.

sponsorship.intro: Join us as a sponsor or partner and align your brand with Africa's AI future. Here are the opportunities available:

packages.name: Gold Partnership
benefits: Logo on all marketing materials (website, app, banners)
10 VIP tickets with gala dinner access
Featured in press releases and media coverage
Branding in summit program booklet (full page)
Social media promotion across all channels

packages.name: Silver Partnership
benefits: Logo on website and event app

packages.name: Startup Track Sponsor
benefits: Naming rights for AI Pitch Competition

faqs.question: Why should our organisation sponsor PAAIS 2026?
faqs.answer: This is a high-visibility opportunity to align your brand with the future of African tech. Benefits include direct access to 1,000+ delegates, networking with government ministers and tech giants (Google, AWS, MTN), and participation in shaping Africa's AI future. Sponsors also gain exclusive access to the $1 Billion Ghana-UAE Innovation Hub discussions.

faqs.question: What sponsorship tiers are available?
faqs.answer: We offer Gold ($5,000), Silver ($2,500), Bronze ($1,000), Food & Beverage ($1,000), and Startup Track ($1,500) sponsorship tiers. Custom strategic partnerships are also available for organizations wanting deeper engagement.

faqs.question: Can we customize a sponsorship package?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We work with sponsors to create customized packages that align with your specific goals and budget. Contact our partnerships team to discuss tailored opportunities.

registration.note: Free participation to democratize AI knowledge, but registration is required as capacity is limited.
includes: Full access to all sessions (in-person or virtual)
Networking opportunities with attendees and speakers
Access to the event networking app
registration.instructions: Early registration is strongly recommended as seats are limited to 1,000 in-person attendees. Virtual registration is unlimited but requires sign-up. Registration closes on September 15, 2026 or when capacity is reached.

qa.welcome: You can ask me specific questions about:
examples: What are the dates for the summit?
What topics are you looking for speakers?
qa.fallback: I couldn't find an answer to that question. Would you like to connect to a human representative or explore other topics?
